roles.name: Godfather
roles.description: Chooses the Mafia's target each night. Use `/kill player-name` in this DM with the bot to kill your chosen player. A separate message will be sent with the identity of the other mob member. During the day you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when there are more Mafia than other factions.
roles.short_description: Immune, chooses Mafia target.

roles.name: Town Doctor
roles.description: You are town aligned and can protect one player each night from being killed. Use `/heal player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot to heal your chosen player. During the day you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when all Mafia and the SK are dead.
roles.short_description: Can heal one player each night.

roles.name: Plain Townie
roles.description: A regular member of the town. During the day, you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when all Mafia and the SK are dead.
roles.short_description: Normal member of town.

roles.short_description: Immune, chooses Mafia target.

roles.name: Mob Goon
roles.description: A member of the Mafia. A separate message will be sent with the identity of the other mob member. You will be promoted to Godfather if the Godfather dies. roles.description: You are town aligned and can prevent one player from performing their night action each night. Use `/block player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot to block your chosen player. During the day, you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when all Mafia and the SK are dead.
roles.short_description: Prevents one player from performing their night action.

roles.name: Plain Townie
roles.description: A regular member of the town. During the day, you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when all Mafia and the SK are dead.
roles.short_description: Normal member of town.

roles.name: Serial Killer
roles.description: Kills one player each night. Use `/kill player-name` in this DM with the bot to kill your chosen player. During the day, you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when all Mafia and town players are dead.
roles.short_description: Kills one player each night.

roles.name: Godfather
roles.description: Chooses the Mafia's target each night. Use `/kill player-name` in this DM with the bot to kill your chosen player. A separate message will be sent with the identity of the other mob member. During the day, you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when there are more Mafia than other factions.
roles.short_description: Chooses the Mafia's target each night.

roles.name: Mob Goon
roles.description: A member of the Mafia. A separate message will be sent with the identity of the other mob member. You will be promoted to Godfather if the Godfather dies. During the day, you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when there are more Mafia than other factions.
roles.short_description: Standard Mafia member.

roles.name: Mob Role Blocker
roles.description: Prevents one player from performing their night action each night. Cannot target the same player two nights in a row. Use `/block player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot to block your chosen player. During the day you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when all Mafia and the SK are dead.
roles.short_description: Prevents one player from performing their night action.

roles.name: Town Cop
roles.description: You are town aligned and can investigate one player each night to learn their alignment. Use `/investigate player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot to investigate your chosen player. Results will be sent as soon as the day phase starts. Use them wisely. During the day, you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when all Mafia and the SK are dead.
roles.short_description: Investigates one player each night to learn their alignment.

roles.name: Town Doctor
roles.description: You are town aligned and can protect one player each night from being killed. Use `/heal player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot to heal your chosen player.
